steps.name: Ember starts with two Dash charges
steps.criteria: Ember has exactly 2 Dash charges when a new run begins

steps.name: Ember starts with empty Special charge
steps.criteria: Ember's Special charge is 0 when a new run begins

steps.name: Ember starts without the egg
steps.criteria: Ember does not carry the egg when a new run begins

steps.name: Ember starts on Floor 1
steps.criteria: Ember begins on Floor 1 when a new run begins

steps.name: Dash advances Ember three squares
steps.criteria: Ember's position advances 3 squares after a successful Dash through a guard

steps.name: Dash decrements charge by one
steps.criteria: Ember's Dash charge count decrements by 1 after a successful Dash

steps.name: Dash ends the encounter
steps.criteria: The encounter ends after Ember uses Dash

steps.name: Normal movement locked in encounter
steps.criteria: Normal movement is unavailable when Ember is in an active encounter

steps.name: Descending stairs increments floor counter
steps.criteria: The floor counter increments when Ember steps onto the stairs

steps.name: Descent places Ember at next floor entry
steps.criteria: Ember's position resets to the Floor 2 entry point after descending

steps.name: Death fires when HP reaches zero
steps.criteria: The death screen appears when Ember's HP drops to 0

steps.name: HP never displays a negative value
steps.criteria: HP display does not show a negative value when damage exceeds remaining HP

steps.name: Dash passes through enemy square
steps.criteria: Ember passes through the guard's square without stopping when she Dashes

steps.name: Last charge depletes to zero
steps.criteria: Ember uses Dash with exactly 1 charge remaining and it depletes to 0

steps.name: Dash cooldown begins after use
steps.criteria: The Dash cooldown timer begins immediately after a Dash is used

steps.name: Dash charge replenishes after cooldown
steps.criteria: A Dash charge replenishes after the configured cooldown duration elapses

steps.name: Dash not selectable with zero charges
steps.criteria: Dash is not selectable when both charges are depleted

steps.name: Blocked Dash does not consume charge
steps.criteria: Dash charge is not consumed when Dash is attempted with 0 charges

steps.name: Dash blocked during boss encounter
steps.criteria: Dash is blocked during the boss encounter

steps.name: Blocked Dash on boss does not consume charge
steps.criteria: Dash charge is not consumed when Dash is attempted during the boss encounter

steps.name: Dash blocking driven by flag, not floor number
steps.criteria: Dash blocking is controlled by the boss encounter flag, not by the floor number

steps.name: Run generates 3 to 5 floors
steps.criteria: A new run generates between 3 and 5 floors

steps.name: Floor 1 has no egg room
steps.criteria: Floor 1 contains no egg room

steps.name: Exactly one egg room on mid-floors
steps.criteria: Exactly one floor in the range 2 through 4 contains an egg room

steps.name: Floor 5 has boss encounter and exit square
steps.criteria: Floor 5 contains the boss encounter and the exit square

steps.name: Floor 5 has no egg room
steps.criteria: Floor 5 contains no egg room

steps.name: Every floor is navigable end to end
steps.criteria: Each floor has a reachable path from entry to staircase with no inescapable dead ends

steps.name: 3-floor run final floor has boss and exit
steps.criteria: In a 3-floor run, the final floor contains the boss encounter and exit

steps.name: 3-floor run egg room is on Floor 2
steps.criteria: In a 3-floor run, the egg room is on Floor 2 because Floor 3 is the final floor

steps.name: Descent places Ember at floor entry point
steps.criteria: Ember is placed at the entry point of the new floor after descending

phases.name: Combat
phases.note: Playtest-minimal scope: 04-01, 04-04, 04-11. All other steps deferred until post-playtest.

steps.name: Enemy attack timer fires damage when unbraced
steps.criteria: When combat is active the enemy attack timer decrements each tick. When it fires and no Brace window is open, Ember takes full encounter damage. When the Brace window is active the attack is absorbed (zero damage).

steps.name: Brace keeps encounter active
steps.criteria: Brace keeps Ember in the encounter — it does not end combat

steps.name: Brace selectable with zero Dash charges
steps.criteria: Brace is selectable even when both Dash charges are depleted

steps.name: Fatal unbraced hit triggers death condition
steps.criteria: When an unbraced enemy attack reduces Ember's HP to zero, the death state fires and HP is clamped at 0

steps.name: Special not selectable below full charge
steps.criteria: Special is not selectable when the charge meter is below full

steps.name: Special unavailable at game start
steps.criteria: Special cannot be used at game start because the charge begins at 0

steps.name: Special charge resets after use
steps.criteria: Ember's Special charge resets to 0 after the Special attack fires

steps.name: Special deals significant damage to enemy
steps.criteria: The enemy takes significant damage when Ember fires Special

steps.name: Special overlay transitions back after confirmation
steps.criteria: After firing Special, the screen mode transitions away from the narrative overlay

steps.name: Boss defeat unblocks exit
steps.criteria: The boss is defeatable and the path to the exit opens after defeat

steps.name: Special charge accumulates over time
steps.criteria: Special charge increases when time passes during dungeon navigation

steps.name: Special charge cannot be full before first encounter
steps.criteria: Special charge cannot reach full in the time available before the first encounter

steps.name: Brace parry grants Special charge bonus
steps.criteria: A successful Brace parry (enemy attack lands during the invulnerability window) increases Ember's Special charge by the configured bonus amount

steps.name: Entering egg room triggers narrative
steps.criteria: Entering the egg room triggers the egg discovery narrative event

steps.name: Egg indicator activates after confirmation
steps.criteria: The EGG indicator activates after Ember confirms the egg discovery event

steps.name: Dungeon resumes after egg confirmation
steps.criteria: The dungeon view resumes immediately after the egg discovery event is confirmed

steps.name: Egg indicator inactive until room entered
steps.criteria: The EGG indicator remains inactive when Ember has not yet entered the egg room

steps.name: Upgrade prompt shows exactly 3 options
steps.criteria: The upgrade prompt shows exactly 3 options at a milestone floor transition

steps.name: Selecting upgrade applies immediately and resumes dungeon
steps.criteria: Selecting an upgrade applies its effect immediately and resumes the dungeon

steps.name: Dash cooldown upgrade reduces cooldown
steps.criteria: A Dash cooldown reduction upgrade measurably reduces the cooldown duration

steps.name: Dash charge cap upgrade increases capacity
steps.criteria: A Dash charge cap upgrade increases the maximum number of charges Ember can hold

steps.name: Already-selected upgrade not re-offered
steps.criteria: An already-selected upgrade does not appear in a subsequent milestone prompt

steps.name: Upgrade pool has enough unique choices
steps.criteria: The upgrade pool provides at least 3 unique choices

steps.name: Special charge ready state at maximum
steps.criteria: The Special charge meter shows a ready state when charge reaches maximum

steps.name: Exit with egg fires narrative event
steps.criteria: Stepping onto the exit square with the egg fires the exit patio narrative event

steps.name: Win state declared after exit confirmation
steps.criteria: The win state is declared after Ember confirms the exit patio narrative

steps.name: Exit without egg does not trigger win
steps.criteria: The win state is not declared when Ember reaches the exit without the egg

steps.name: Win state requires exit position
steps.criteria: Win state is not declared when Ember has the egg but is not at the exit square

steps.name: Death screen fires at exactly zero HP
steps.criteria: The death screen appears when Ember's HP drops to exactly 0

steps.name: HP clamped at zero on fatal blow
steps.criteria: HP is displayed as 0, not a negative number, when a fatal blow is received

steps.name: Restart resets all state variables
steps.criteria: After restarting from the death screen, Ember returns to initial game state: full HP, two Dash charges, no Special charge, no egg, Floor 1, and no active upgrades

steps.name: Restart clears Dash cooldown timers
steps.criteria: The Dash cooldown timers are cleared when Ember restarts

steps.name: Death fires correctly after repeated unbraced hits on Floor 1
steps.criteria: Death fires correctly when Ember takes repeated unbraced hits until HP reaches 0 on Floor 1
